name: Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (8 oz.) prune plum lekvar filling
2 cups flour (mix of whole wheat and all-purpose)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Coat a 9 x 13 inch pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine grated carrots, sugar, crushed pineapple, and lekvar filling.
4. Add egg whites and vanilla; mix thoroughly until combined.
5. Gradually add flour mixture and remaining ingredients (baking soda, cinnamon, salt).
6. Stir until all ingredients are well incorporated.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for approximately 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
